title: 「as + 形容詞 + as」句型
titleZh: 「as + 形容詞 + as」表示程度相同
titleEn: Using as + adjective + as to express equal degree

source.file: Sentence Structure 93 - 「as + 形容詞 + as」表示程度相同.pdf
omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: Subject + be / modal + be + as + adjective or adjective phrase + as + comparison target

formulas.formula: Subject + be / modal + be + as + adjective or adjective phrase + as + comparison target

example: Animals are as important as humans.

examples.en: Animals are as important as humans.
Tom is as tall as Ben.
The first website is as easy to use as the second website.
examples.zh: 第一個網站和第二個網站一樣容易使用。

meaning.zh: as + 形容詞 + as 表示兩個人或事物在某項特質上的程度相同。

rules.zh: 兩個 as 中間使用形容詞原形，不要使用比較級。
rules.en: Use the base form of the adjective between the two instances of as, not a comparative form.

rules.zh: 這個句型表示兩者程度相同，而不是其中一方較高或較低。
rules.en: This structure shows that two things have the same degree of a quality.

rules.zh: 題目中的名詞有時需要改成形容詞，例如 the same height → as tall as。
rules.en: A noun in the source may need to change into an adjective, such as the same height → as tall as.

rules.zh: 必須保留原句的時態和其他重要資料。
rules.en: Preserve the original tense and other important information.

rules.zh: 形容詞可以是一個字，也可以是一個短語。
rules.en: The adjective may be a single word or an adjective phrase.

rules.zh: 本練習只集中使用肯定形式 as + adjective + as。
rules.en: This exercise focuses only on the affirmative form as + adjective + as.

benefits.zh: 清楚表示兩個人或事物在某方面程度相同。
benefits.en: It clearly shows that two people or things have the same degree of a quality.

benefits.zh: 把兩項描述合併成一句，令句子更緊密、更容易理解。
benefits.en: It combines two descriptions into one tighter and clearer sentence.

benefits.zh: 避免錯誤地表示其中一方較好、較差、較大或較重要，令比較更加準確和公平。
benefits.en: It makes comparisons more accurate and balanced by avoiding an unintended higher or lower ranking.

benefits.zh: 可以代替 equally 和 the same 等說法，增加句式變化。
benefits.en: It avoids repeatedly using equally and the same and adds sentence variety.

benefits.zh: A is as ___ as B 是容易使用的比較句框，適合人物、產品、地方、計劃及服務。
benefits.en: A is as ___ as B is a practical comparison frame for people, products, places, plans and services.

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using as + adjective + as to show that two people or things have the same degree of a quality.
Preserve the original meaning, tense and important information.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 as + 形容詞 + as 改寫以下句子，以表示兩個人或事物在某方面程度相同。
請保留原句的意思、時態和重要資料。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Tom and Ben are equally tall.
questions.promptZh: 湯姆和本一樣高。
questions.answer: Tom is as tall as Ben.
questions.answerZh: 湯姆和本一樣高。
questions.highlight: Tom is as tall as Ben.

questions.prompt: This box and that box are equally heavy.
questions.promptZh: 這個箱子和那個箱子一樣重。
questions.answer: This box is as heavy as that box.
questions.answerZh: 這個箱子和那個箱子一樣重。
questions.highlight: This box is as heavy as that box.

questions.prompt: Amy is sixteen years old. Lily is sixteen too.
questions.promptZh: 艾米十六歲，莉莉也是十六歲。
questions.answer: Amy is as old as Lily.

questions.highlight: This room is as large as the room next door.

questions.prompt: The blue chair and the red chair are equally comfortable.

questions.answer: The blue chair is as comfortable as the red chair.

questions.highlight: The blue chair is as comfortable as the red chair.

questions.highlight: Today is as hot as yesterday.

questions.promptZh: 黑色袋和棕色袋一樣昂貴。
questions.answer: The black bag is as expensive as the brown bag.

questions.prompt: Which is more convenient, the bus or the train? Neither; they are equally convenient.
questions.promptZh: 巴士和火車哪一種較方便？兩者沒有分別；它們同樣方便。
questions.answer: The bus is as convenient as the train.
questions.answerZh: 巴士和火車一樣方便。
questions.highlight: The bus is as convenient as the train.

questions.prompt: This week’s test and last week’s test are equally difficult.
questions.promptZh: 本週的測驗和上週的測驗一樣困難。
questions.answer: This week’s test is as difficult as last week’s test.
questions.answerZh: 本週的測驗和上週的測驗一樣困難。
questions.highlight: This week’s test is as difficult as last week’s test.

questions.prompt: There is no difference between Mia and Zoe in friendliness.
questions.promptZh: 米婭和佐伊的友善程度沒有分別。
questions.answer: Mia is as friendly as Zoe.
questions.answerZh: 米婭和佐伊一樣友善。
questions.highlight: Mia is as friendly as Zoe.

questions.prompt: The riverside park is clean, and the town park is equally clean.
questions.promptZh: 河畔公園很清潔，市鎮公園也同樣清潔。
questions.answer: The riverside park is as clean as the town park.
questions.answerZh: 河畔公園和市鎮公園一樣清潔。
questions.highlight: The riverside park is as clean as the town park.

questions.prompt: For this task, a laptop and a tablet are equally useful.
questions.promptZh: 對於這項任務，手提電腦和平板電腦同樣有用。
questions.answer: A laptop is as useful as a tablet for this task.
questions.answerZh: 對於這項任務，手提電腦和平板電腦一樣有用。
questions.highlight: A laptop is as useful as a tablet for this task.

questions.prompt: Which is more interesting, the history book or the science book? Neither; they are equally interesting.
questions.promptZh: 歷史書和科學書哪一本較有趣？兩者沒有分別；它們同樣有趣。
questions.answer: The history book is as interesting as the science book.

questions.prompt: Safety checks show that the old road and the new road are equally safe.
questions.promptZh: 安全檢查顯示，舊道路和新道路同樣安全。
questions.answer: The old road is as safe as the new road.

questions.prompt: Sarah and Daniel show the same degree of patience when teaching children.

questions.answer: Sarah is as patient as Daniel when teaching children.

questions.highlight: Sarah is as patient as Daniel when teaching children.

questions.prompt: Our school library and the community library have the same low noise level.
questions.promptZh: 我們的學校圖書館和社區圖書館同樣安靜。

questions.highlight: Our school library is as quiet as the community library.

questions.prompt: Which doctor is more careful, Dr Lee or Dr Wong? The review found no difference between them.
questions.promptZh: 李醫生和黃醫生哪一位較細心？評估結果顯示兩人沒有分別。
questions.answer: Dr Lee is as careful as Dr Wong.

questions.prompt: The clock tower matches the office building in height.
questions.promptZh: 鐘樓和辦公大樓的高度相同。
questions.answer: The clock tower is as tall as the office building.
questions.answerZh: 鐘樓和辦公大樓一樣高。
questions.highlight: The clock tower is as tall as the office building.

questions.prompt: Neither solution is more practical than the other.
questions.promptZh: 兩個解決方法都沒有比另一個更加實際可行。
questions.answer: The first solution is as practical as the second solution.

questions.prompt: Phone A and Phone B have screens of equal brightness.
questions.promptZh: 電話 A 和電話 B 的屏幕亮度相同。
questions.answer: Phone A’s screen is as bright as Phone B’s.

questions.prompt: The new delivery service matches the old service in reliability.
questions.promptZh: 新的送貨服務和舊服務同樣可靠。
questions.answer: The new delivery service is as reliable as the old service.
questions.answerZh: 新的送貨服務和舊服務一樣可靠。
questions.highlight: The new delivery service is as reliable as the old service.

questions.prompt: During the morning rush, the yellow route and the green route are equally quick.
questions.promptZh: 在早上繁忙時間，黃色路線和綠色路線同樣快捷。
questions.answer: The yellow route is as quick as the green route during the morning rush.

questions.prompt: The clinic and the hospital are equally busy this morning.
questions.promptZh: 診所和醫院今天早上同樣繁忙。

questions.prompt: Tests show that the first medicine and the second medicine are equally effective at relieving the pain.
questions.promptZh: 測試顯示，第一種和第二種藥物在紓緩痛楚方面同樣有效。
questions.answer: The first medicine is as effective at relieving the pain as the second medicine.

questions.highlight: The first medicine is as effective at relieving the pain as the second medicine.

questions.promptZh: 工程師發現再造塑膠和傳統塑膠的強度沒有分別。
questions.answer: Recycled plastic is as strong as traditional plastic.

questions.prompt: User testing gave the two websites the same score for ease of use.

questions.answer: The village is as peaceful as the small island.

questions.prompt: Why did the team refuse to choose between Plan A and Plan B? They considered both plans equally valuable.

questions.highlight: Plan A is as valuable as Plan B.

questions.answer: This illness is as serious as that one.

questions.prompt: The new design looks simpler, but its level of complexity is the same as that of the old design.
questions.promptZh: 新設計看起來較簡單，但它的複雜程度和舊設計相同。

questions.answerZh: 網上課堂和面對面課堂一樣具挑戰性。
questions.highlight: The online class is as challenging as the face-to-face class.

questions.promptZh: 哪一張地圖提供較準確的方向？電子地圖和印刷地圖的準確度得分相同。
questions.answer: The digital map is as accurate as the printed map.

questions.answer: Model A’s battery is as powerful as Model B’s.

questions.highlight: A video call is as useful as a face-to-face meeting for routine updates.

questions.prompt: Although the old bridge is much older, engineers found no difference in strength between the two bridges.
questions.promptZh: 雖然舊橋的歷史悠久得多，但工程師發現兩座橋的強度沒有分別。
questions.answer: Although the old bridge is much older, it is as strong as the new bridge.
questions.answerZh: 雖然舊橋的歷史悠久得多，但它和新橋一樣堅固。
questions.highlight: Although the old bridge is much older, it is as strong as the new bridge.

questions.promptZh: 兩個緊急應變計劃在水災期間保護居民方面都被評為同樣有效。
questions.answer: The first emergency plan is as effective at protecting residents during floods as the second one.
questions.answerZh: 第一個緊急應變計劃在水災期間保護居民方面和第二個計劃一樣有效。
questions.highlight: The first emergency plan is as effective at protecting residents during floods as the second one.

questions.prompt: The electric bus is quieter than the diesel bus, but the transport department gave both buses the same reliability rating.
questions.promptZh: 電動巴士比柴油巴士安靜，但運輸部門給予兩種巴士相同的可靠程度評分。
questions.answer: Although the electric bus is quieter, it is as reliable as the diesel bus.
questions.answerZh: 雖然電動巴士較安靜，但它和柴油巴士一樣可靠。
questions.highlight: Although the electric bus is quieter, it is as reliable as the diesel bus.

questions.prompt: Although the older textbook uses fewer pictures, reviewers found it and the newer textbook equally detailed.
questions.promptZh: 雖然較舊的教科書使用較少圖片，但評審認為它和較新的教科書同樣詳細。
questions.answer: Although the older textbook uses fewer pictures, it is as detailed as the newer textbook.
questions.answerZh: 雖然較舊的教科書使用較少圖片，但它和較新的教科書一樣詳細。
questions.highlight: Although the older textbook uses fewer pictures, it is as detailed as the newer textbook.

questions.prompt: An environmental review awarded Plan A and Plan B the same rating for environmental friendliness.
questions.promptZh: 環境評估給予計劃 A 和計劃 B 相同的環保程度評分。
questions.answer: Plan A is as environmentally friendly as Plan B.
questions.answerZh: 計劃 A 和計劃 B 一樣環保。
questions.highlight: Plan A is as environmentally friendly as Plan B.

questions.prompt: Although the two proposals use different methods, the panel found no difference in how practical they would be for small schools.
questions.promptZh: 雖然兩項建議使用不同方法，但評審小組認為它們對小型學校而言同樣實際可行。
questions.answer: Although the two proposals use different methods, the first proposal would be as practical as the second for small schools.
questions.answerZh: 雖然兩項建議使用不同方法，但對小型學校而言，第一項建議會和第二項建議一樣實際可行。
questions.highlight: Although the two proposals use different methods, the first proposal would be as practical as the second for small schools.
